es_name: Regulating the physical quality of air for people
notes: betA choline dehydrogenase; choline/betaine metabolism linked to DMS production in marine systems
hppD 4-hydroxyphenylpyruvate dioxygenase; aromatic ring cleavage; tyrosine/xenobiotic degradation
amiE amidase; hydrolyzes amide bonds in xenobiotics (acrylamide, herbicide amides)
ggt gamma-glutamyltranspeptidase; mercapturic acid pathway for xenobiotic elimination
qor NADPH:quinone oxidoreductase; reduces quinones and nitroaromatic xenobiotics
fadD variant; long-chain fatty acid CoA ligase; hydrocarbon remediation
3-beta-hydroxysteroid dehydrogenase; degrades estrogens and other endocrine disruptors in water
VgrG T6SS spike protein; effector delivery; pathogenicity and bacterial warfare indicator
